supply_chain.dependencies: Relies heavily on Apple App Store and Google Play Store for distribution and monetization of mobile applications. Purchases required to be processed through in-app payment systems provided by Apple and Google in most cases. Relies on third-party data centers and cloud-based hosted web service providers, primarily Amazon Web Services.
supply_chain.risks: Apple and Google have broad discretion to change policies regarding mobile operating systems and app stores. Both platforms can limit, eliminate, or interfere with ability to distribute or market applications. Apple and Google are known to retaliate against application developers who challenge their app store rules. Problems with third-party data centers or cloud providers could impair ability to provide services. Apple and Google receive key user data that Match Group would otherwise receive if transacting directly with users.

regulatory_risks: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance and potential penalties
EU Digital Services Act (DSA) requirements on moderation, transparency, and platform safety
UK Online Safety Bill requirements to protect children from inappropriate material
Potential amendments to Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act in the United States
EU Payment Services Directive (PSD2) impacting auto-renewal payments
New legislation in Germany and France on automatic renewal and cancellation of online subscriptions
State and federal legislation regulating artificial intelligence use (Colorado, California, Utah)
Federal Trade Commission investigations and enforcement actions on privacy and data security
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
Comprehensive privacy laws in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Utah, Florida, Montana, Oregon, and Texas
EU Pillar Two Directive establishing minimum 15% effective tax rate for multinational enterprises
Digital sales taxes (Canada implemented retroactive to 2022)
State and country-specific laws governing dating services
Regulation of subscription payment models in various U.S. states
Irish Data Protection Commission inquiry regarding Tinder's GDPR compliance
Potential regulation of app store fees and payment systems
Laws regarding romance scams, financial fraud, and sex-trafficking on platforms

sanction_risks: Suspended services in Russia due to wars in Middle East and Ukraine
Azar service blocked in Saudi Arabia due to compliance challenges
